---
name: Trademark or logo permission
about: For the DeckTrail and OrbitQube names and logos only. You do NOT need this to remove the "Made with DeckTrail" mark, or to run, fork, or redistribute.
title: "Trademark permission: "
labels: trademark-permission
---

<!--
Thanks for asking.

First, in case this is what brought you here: you do NOT need permission to remove the
"Made with DeckTrail by OrbitQube" mark from your decks. The licence does not require it.
Turn it off in your theme config. We ask you to keep it, and that is all it is: an ask.
See ATTRIBUTION.md.

This form is for the other thing: the DeckTrail and OrbitQube NAMES and LOGOS. Naming a
modified version "DeckTrail", using our logos as your own, or offering a hosted service under
the name. See TRADEMARK.md.

You do not need permission to run, modify, fork, or redistribute DeckTrail, or to say your work
is "based on DeckTrail". That is the AGPL, and it is already yours.

Prefer not to ask in public? Email info@orbitqube.com instead.
-->
